case_title: MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION VS. LOUIS ELDER et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-28-2003 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 218
MINUTES FOR MAY-28-2003 2:00 PM FOR DEPT 218

REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-28-2003 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH PRO TEM JUDGE ERIC PETERSON. TO JURY TRIAL ON 6/2/03 IN DEPT. 206. D. CARTER, CLERK; DEBORAH MAYER, CSR.

JUDGE DONNA J. HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER LORETTA NAGERA. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF JUN-02-2003 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUN-02-2003 AT 9:10 AM IN DEPT. 608, OLLIE MARIE-VICTOIRE. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, SENT FOR PROVE-UP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MERCY SERVICES CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ELDER, LOUIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 520 JONES STREET, #714, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $997.89 RENT, $165.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,163.19, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
